texto: The physicality between us was like nothing I’d experienced before. Just the brush of his fingertips over my cheek was enough to make me feel undressed and naked. “I don’t know,” I answered. “What do you suggest? Culture, entertainment, or the underground car park in Tottenham Court Road?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pat Spence: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “The physicality between us was like nothing I’d experienced before. Just the brush of his fingert…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, abigail, affair pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e affair.

Culture, entertainment, or the underground car park in Tottenham Court Road?

texto: Emily, there are enemies everywhere. We have to be on our guard, especially for the next couple of weeks.’ Theo sighed unhappily. ‘This is going to be the longest fortnight of my life.’ ‘That’s saying something,’ I joked, ‘given how long you’ve lived.’ ‘Exactly,’ he said, without smiling.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Pat Spence sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Emily, there are enemies everywhere. We have to be on our guard, especially for the next couple o…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, horror, pnr, útil em momentos de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: Emily, there are enemies everywhere. We have to be on our guard, especially for the next couple of weeks.’ Theo sighed unhappily. ‘This is going to be the longest fortnight of my life.’ ‘That’s saying something,’ I joked, ‘given how long you’ve lived.’ ‘Exactly,’ he said, without smiling.
